The same, pleasant smell from before wafted towards you, though slightly stronger. It surrounded you as you stepped deeper into the massive shoe, but still, it was better than you imagined inside.
You walked forwards until you reached the tip of the slipper. The massive dome fused to the sole without so much as a seam. Everywhere around you was the soft cotton and you got more tired by the second. Finally, you let yourself simply fall to the ground. The material caressed your skin. It was better than any bed you had ever slept in. With heavy eyelids, you yawned one last time, before you drifted off to sleep...
1542211231.title: Slipper Bed

choices: Try to tickle, wiggle, anything to gain her attention
stay still and hope your body holds out
15422112311.content:
You slept peacefully, nothing interesting happened, maybe you dreamt about home, friends, loved ones, it was a pleasant rest. You started to get pulled back into conscious by what sounded like a distance, thunderous yawn, seemingly getting closer and louder as the dream world faded away. Once you awake, you start to stretch your body as you normally would once you wake up. After a well needed stretch, you start to open your eyes, your vision is still a bit blurry, so it was hard to focus on anything in particular. All you can see is lavender, all around you, the floor, the walls, the ceiling, all of it. As you focus on clearing your eyes, the smell starts to get you back to your senses, the strong lavender scent you inhaled last night, this brought all of last nights events rushing back to your mind. The lavender giantess, the blanket slide, and finally your decision to sleep in the giant slipper.

As you realise this, you hear the giant bed springs creaking above the slipper roof, followed by a pair of giant ‘BOOMS!!’, your body then acts as on its own, you need to get out of her slipper and gain her attention, before anything problematic happens. You start to run towards the opening of the footwear, you feet sinking slightly into the vast insole, the air becoming more and more fresher the closer to the exit you are. As you get towards the only exit of this self made prison, you look up in freight, as your view is dominated by the massive lavender sole of the giants foot, your mind screams for you to start moving, however your body is too shocked to even move a muscle.

You are pushed down onto your back, as the giant gently lowers her foot onto your tiny body and pushes you deep into the insole of her shoe, you can feel the massive foot pressing into the front of your body. The slipper had cooled down during the night, which almost makes the giant, fleshy soles warmth inviting, the scent of lavender having magnified 10 fold. However there is too much fear going through your entire body right now as old.the pressure building as you’re pushed into the insole and her sole. This is how you die? crushed to death by an unaware giant purple pony, who simply put on her slipper after waking up. You can feel the girl has finished putting on her footwear, you can hear the gigantic toes smash against the tip of the shoe above you, so you can only assume you are roughly under the ball of her foot, suddenly, you start to feel the immense weight that bares down upon you start to get heavier. The giant pony is standing up. You can only think of 1 things to do at this moment in time?
15422112311.title: Twilights Living Insole

choices: "... that I'm gonna participate in the Running of the Leaves!"
"... that I wanted to help Fluttershy with her Animals!"
"... that I wanted to help Pinkie prepare for Rarity's birthday!"
154221123112.content:
Despite the enormous weight resting on top of you, you resisted the urge to try to escape. It was a miracle the titaness hadn't felt you yet. If she did, the slightest twitch of her foot might be enough to completely annihilate you within her slipper. No, getting her attention was the last thing you needed right now.

Your stomach dropped as the massive creature took her first step. Suddenly, all the weight lifted off of you and you soared through the air. The pressure faded. Greedily, you sucked in the air, its lavender scent making your eyes water. Down here, under her foot, it was so much stronger than before...
The relief came to a crushing end as her foot connected with the ground again. Your eardrums rang from the explosive impact a single step of her made. Thankfully, the slippers muffled the noise somewhat. Otherwise, you might have gone deaf right here. However, you couldn't really appreciate this small blessing, as the ball of her foot ground you even deeper into the sole, making your muscles scream with panic. A moment later, you were soaring again... and the next step was even more brutal. You gritted your teeth. All you could do was hope that your body didn't break.

Twilight, completely unaware, descended the spiral stair case of her house-library hybrid. Spike, her little dragon companion, was already up and as usual, had taken care of breakfast. The delicious smell of pancakes wafted through the air.
"Morning, Spike!" she shouted through the room, a smile on her face.
"Morning, Twilight!" Spike returned her greeting. Just as she sat down at the table, he turned, two plates stacked with pancakes, a fat helping of syrup on both of them. At last, you had a break from her apocalyptic foot steps. Even though you had somehow gotten pushed further ahead, now only a few millimeters separating you from her toes, you basked in the relative calm. At least, nothing was broken...

"Oh wow! You're planning on something big, Spike?" Twilight blanched at the sheer amount of food before her.
"You're asking me?" The little dragon raised an eyebrow at her, giving her a questioning look. A chill ran through Twilight. Even you, buried underneath her sole, could feel the shiver.
"Don't tell me you forgot..." Spike said, a worried tone creeping into his voice. Twilight thought for a second. Then, a smile erupted over her face.

"Of course I didn't forget..."
154221123112.title: Unwitting and unnoticed passenger

choices: A inside to 1 of the shoes (Purple,Orange,Blue)
The hard, wooden floor
1542211231121.content:
"...that I'm gonna participate in the Running of the Leaves!"
"Glad you finally remembered" the young drake thankfully replied, "Still, don't eat to fast or you might injure yourself. Im heading off early to help set up, I shall see you at the starting line" Spike explained his reasons whilst placing his plate in the sink, then venturing off into the front lobby of the library, leaving Twilight to finish her breakfast in peace. She quietly ate some of her assistants amazingly fluffy pancakes, whilst admiring the view of the early sun raising through the kitchen window.
"What a beautiful sunrise, so glad it is going to be a lovely clear day today, should be an interesting race non the less" exclaimed the young scholar, whilst sub-conscinecly rubbing her feet along her bare lavender coloured leg.

You couldn't believe you were still alive, after having tons of pony mass repeatedly crashing down on top of your entire frame, your head being buried deep into this purple ponies sole, and being forced to taste her musty foot flesh. You tired to hear the conversation happening above, but mostly this was muffled due to your correct predicament. You managed to hear the term 'Running of the leaves" as your unaware giantess exclaimed this term with such enthusiasm. While you had never heard of this so called event, you couldn't help but feel nervous, as you can't imagine this running of the leaves means a nice slow walk through the park. Your thoughts were suddenly interrupted as this pony stands back onto her feet, seemingly in a hurry, as you are then pounded in between the girls uncaring sole and her insole.

Twilight was simply admiring the view, when suddenly she heard some banging on the libraries front door. Swallowing the last piece of her breakfast, she quickly runs across the library to see who is knocking this early in the morning. Upon opening the door, she is met face to face with her two friends, Applejack and Rainbow Dash, whom also are participating in the Running of the leaves today. "Applejack, Rainbow, you're here early, please come in. Spike has just cleaned the main lobby, so if you could please..." "We know what you are gonna say egghead, you say it every time we enter" Rainbow interrupted, with a tired expression being worn across her face.
As the pair entered the building, they swiftly removed their footwear, both of which are wearing some running sneakers, Rainbows more worn out looking blue pair, and Applejacks dusty orange pair, and placing them next to Twilights own purple coloured pair.

As they were removing their footwear, Twilight happened to scratch the sole of her foot, thankfully the one you are currently under. You couldn't see anything due to your face being buried in her sole, but you most certainly felt her finger nails dig you out of your impression, and cause you to fall towards the ground beneath. Your eyes snap open as you see your landing point to be.....
1542211231121.title: The running of the leaves

choices: Purple Shoe (Twilight's)
Orange Shoe (Applejack's)
Blue Shoe (Rainbow's)
15422112311211.content: You peeled off the massive pony's sole, finally popping free from the flesh that engulfed you so mercilessly. Then, you fell... and in that moment, the world slowed to a crawl as you saw with terror that you were hurtling directly towards the opening of the...
15422112311211.title: Your choice of shoe!

choices: You were pushed back - and are trapped in Applejack's shoe!
You manage to push yourself out - escaping onto the floor!
Applejack stops - looking directly at you!
154221123112112.content:
Completely unceremoniously, and without any of the titans noticing, you plummeted into the gaping maw of the dusty, worn, orange sneaker. As soon as you hit the sole, your nostrils were filled with an indescribable stench. The material looked like canvas, but as your body rubbed against it, you realized it was more leathery and stronger than simple running shoes. They might as well have doubled as the footwear of someone working all day in the sun. The smell that permeated every inch of the sole lent all the more credence to it. It was overpowering, a mixture of old sweat and ripe apples. Even compared to the lavender pony's meaty soles, this was absolute hell. You had to get out of here, quick.

While you gasped for breath, tears welling up in your eyes, the three titanesses sat down at the kitchen table, Spike bringing seconds so that everyone could have a tasty snack before the race started.
"Thanks, Spike!" Rainbow shouted, as she eagerly dug into her own plate.
"Mind ya' manners," Applejack grumbled, though she ate no more dignified. To Twilight, both of them looked as if that had been the first meal in days for them. And she had a theory, on why that was. She couldn't help but giggle.
"So... how long have you been training this year?"
"Well..." Rainbow mumbled through mouthfuls of pancake, "we stopped at midnight."
"And since one o'clock we're warmin' up," Applejack finished. Twilight only now noticed how frazzled both of her athletic friends looked. Never before had she seen both of them this worked up. Like every year, both of them were intent on winning the race, and this time both of them had gone all out in their preparation.
Twilight gave them a sheepish smile. Her training had consisted of reading her favorite Daring Do novel and getting an extra hour of sleep. She knew she could hardly compete with the both of them - only once managing to beat them through their own bull headedness - but no one else would be able to either. The Running of the Leaves had mostly become a contest between these two, the third place becoming the new first for the other citizens of Ponyville.

Both of them finished their plates at once and instantly turned towards each other, daring smiles on their faces.
"See you at the finish line," Rainbow smirked.
"Don't worry, I'll be waving to you all the while you catch up," Applejack joked back. A few years ago, Rainbow might have taken it as an insult, but by now their rivalry had turned far more friendly.
They jumped out of their seats, ready to get out and race.

You had barely made any progress getting out of the gargantuan sneaker. The world blurred before your eyes, as the heavy scent of sweat nearly drove you into unconsciousness. Only when the earth started to quake once more, adrenaline shot through your body. You knew what was coming next - and you wouldn't be able to bear to be trapped in this shoe! You had to get out, quick!
Trying your best to power through the stench, you grabbed hold of the shoe's wall and started climbing. Thankfully, they were worn down enough that your hands could easily slip into the cracks of the material. Still, this advantage was nearly useless because of your lack of strength. Additionally, each step of the giantesses' steps shook the ground, threatening to make you fall back towards the sole.
"You comin', Twilight?" The gigantic, orange mare shouted as she got closer. Instantly, a third set of footsteps made your life hell. You could barely hold on, anymore.
Then, a shadow fell over you, and with horror, you saw the thick, orange sole block out the sky. Sweat pearled down the giantess' ankle, making the matted fur glisten. Mercilessly, it came closer, until...
154221123112112.title: Big Apple's sneakers

choices: The trio leave for the race.
1542211231121121.content:
As you stare in complete horror, you notice the newly found orange sky crash into your tiny body, her gigantic toes, while to her simply touch the outer layer of the shoe mouth, cause so much ground shaking tremors that you find yourself plummeting back into the deep cave you found yourself in. You try to call out, however your voice is knocked out of you as your back slams back onto leathery canvas. Your vison blurred, you can only see orange above you, growing darker and darker as this orange titan lowers her foot back into its prison.... and now yours.


You feel a very heavy digit land onto of you, pushing you slightly into it and the insole, the air being pressed out of your lungs, and you find it difficult to gain another breath. What ever little air you can get, is filled with nothing but old sweat and an overpowering scent of ripe apples, you wanted to gag, but being pressed down by a simple toe from this pony has stopped most of your reactions. You suddenly feel yourself being pushed deeper into your prison cell, feeling the old insole scrape against your back, you almost missed the fluffy slipper from your previous prison guard, as you feel your shirt and jeans start tearing from the friction.

Applejack in the mean time was completely unaware that she was currently torturing another sentient being within her old sneakers. All she felt was the old, worn down insole scrape against her toes and sole of her thick sole. She knew she had to get a new pair at some point, however finding the time to actually head to the closest clothing store was difficult, especially when the farm needing tended to every day. She could feel the shoe had cooled down since the removal of her foot, however she could also feel the old built up sweat start to tickle her toes, enough so that she simply wiggled her toes the further they got into their temporary home.


As you were pushed deeper into the cavern, you could feel the object resting on your frame lift, vibrations filled your surroundings, and you inhale as much air as you could, regardless how stale the air around you was, you felt the giant digit land just above behind your head, meaning her foot has moved further in the shoe, however your legs started to flatten and bend as you felt her thick sole start to compress your body under itself like a steamroller. You start to panic as the pressure builds down by your legs, and is raising up throughout your body as her foot is pushed further in, its not long until your stomach is compressed, followed by your ribcage, the air in your lungs once again being pushed from your body, you scream as loud as your body can, before your face too is forced underneath the thick ball of her foot. Any scream that leaves your mouth now is heavily muffled, not only by the massive sole that bares down upon you, but the shoe as well...
1542211231121121.title: Apple baked and trapped... Again

choices: You bite into Applejack's toe, hopefully drawing her attention!
You try to reach the hole, desperate to escape!
The race starts - and you're along for the ride!
15422112311211211.content:
You were relived at first when the pressure lifted off you, greedily sucking in new - if not fresh - air. The mix of salty sweat and apples made you gag, but at least you could feel life giving oxygen enter your lungs again. Only a moment later, after your brain had stopped screaming at you for air, did you realize what exactly this brief relief meant. Your eyes widened and you opened your mouth to scream.
But no sound escaped you as the titaness stepped forward, burying you once more under her sole. The thickness of her big toe rolled over you, pressing you into the sole. Even worse, the sticky flesh forced itself into your open mouth as your body got completely enveloped by it. The pressure was indescribable. It felt as if a house had collapsed on top of you, only worse. The heat the massive pony's foot radiated made you feel as if you were stuck in a sauna, only it was her sweat rolling down your body, drenching you. Every bone in your body felt as if it was about to break.

"Ready, everyone?" The voice was muffled, barely reaching you through the walls of your prison, but you recognized it as the voice of the lavender giantess whose foot you had been stuck to previously. At this point you wished you had never tried to escape. At least, her slippers had been more comfortable.
"You betcha'," one of the two others answered. You didn't care who it was. The only thing your mind could care about was to get away by any means necessary. But of course, there was no escape. You were sealed into a perfect prison, completely paralyzed by the sheer weight of your captor.
And when the pressure lifted again, you knew it was about to get so much worse...

When the giantess' foot crashed down again, you were certain you were going to pop like an overripe berry. Somehow, you didn't. Not that you could be glad. It only meant that you had to endure more torment...
The second step pushed you just a tiny bit forward, but it was enough to finally tear your clothes off of you completely. Now naked, it only took seconds to completely drench you in her sweat, your own starting to mix with the gargantuan pearls rolling down her toes.
And after the third step, blissful unconsciousness finally took hold of you. Still, even to the last moment, you were terrified. This "Running of the Leaves" hadn't even started yet and you were already completely exhausted. How could you hope to survive that...


Twilight stayed a bit behind her eager friends as they walked to the edge of the White Tail Woods. Applejack and Rainbow Dash kept exchanging quips and jabs, the excitement of the upcoming competition getting the better of them. Twilight chuckled. It was always like this, but she was happy how friendly their rivalry had become since the first time she had taken part. Of course, it didn't even enter her mind to try to compete with either of them. She would just do her best and enjoy the scenery.
When they arrived, her friends immediately dashed towards the pony giving out the number stickers and rushed to the starting line. A lot of pony's were present, Twilight noticed. More than usual, even the ones she wouldn't have pegged for athletes. Even Bon Bon was competing, no doubt dragged out of her shop by Lyra.
Twilight got her own number and joined her friends at the starting line. In only a few minutes, the race would begin. No doubt Pinkie would commentate from her trusty balloon as well, though she didn't see her at the moment. Maybe she was already in the air.
Another pony stepped forward, a white and black checkered flag in her hand. Everyone crouched, taking up their starting positions. Applejack shot one last, cocky grin towards Rainbow Dash...


When you awoke, you almost choked. The pressure had only become more intense, as if the giantess was leaning on you. Your entire body was in agony and a dreadful feeling came over you. Soon, the race would start... you had to find some way to escape, or else you would be pulverized.
Panicking, you turned your head, looking around desperately for any sort of escape. And when you saw it, you couldn't believe your eyes! Only a scant few centimeters away from you, a minuscule hole had formed in the sole. One you could definitely squeeze through.
Of course, getting there was almost impossible, so that escape route only served to taunt you. The only other option would be to try to get the giantess to notice you in some way. Maybe her feet were sensitive enough...
15422112311211211.title: Ready, set, ...

choices: Under a table, surrounded by 6 different coloured feet
In some old barn like house, hearing some snoring from above you
154221123112112113.content:
Your body tensed, the sight, however slight, of the free outdoors through this small tear in this giants shoe filled you with hope, regardless of your current situation. Using most of your strength, you outstretched an hand, trying, begging to any higher being that you can reach this doorway to freedom. You had had enough of this current situation, become some giant ponies living insole, aware or not, you were sick of it. Acting as an object, to soak up any sweat that rolled down onto you, breathing in all those fumes, the salty sweat, what now is an overpowering apple smell, that used to be lavender, assaulting your nose, probably causing damage to your sense os smell.
Then there is the torment your body has been through, you haven't been here for 24 hours, and you have been stepped on, crushed, flattened and compressed by 2 different equine beings, who have been completely oblivious to you and your cries. Your eyes fixated on the exit, fingers stretching, trying to grasp the opening, can just about feel the outside breeze hitting your finger tips... when...

"GOOO" as the flag bearing pony swings the start flag, starting this years running of the leaves. With this, Applejack and Rainbow both charged off the starting line, leaving their unicorn friend behind in their dust, quite literally. Both neck and neck, AJ and RD both looked forward with pure determination burning in their eyes. Rainbow Dash seemingly gliding across the earth beneath her, no doubt being a pegasus has helped in this running style. Applejack on the other hand, was putting as much power into her legs as she could, pushing forward after each step to try and gain the advantage. All the both of them could hear, apart from their steadied breath, was their feet pummelling the ground they step on, leaves crunching, stray branches snapping, even some small rocks being crushed into dust beneath the two.

Which is exactly how you are feeling now, both mentally and physically. Crushed. As soon as you heard the muffled "Gooo!" you knew you would be crushed underfoot. Yet again, you find yourself in this vicious cycle, not popping under this giants weight, but having to bare her weight as she runs. Each foot fall smashing your body to near breaking point. At some point your body had fallen down from under her big toe, and under the vast expanse of the ball of this titans thick sole. Your body, having landed underneath a droplet of sweat, causing your own sweat to become mixed from the get go. You found you could not move at all, you could barely inhale any air, due to the speed of her running. All you could do is try and bare it a little longer. By the time you had re-entered unconsciousness, you could feel you skin had somewhat fussed with the sole of her foot, leaving you to be sentenced to endless torment.

By the time you had awoken from your slumber, you noticed how badly your body ached, using what little strength you had left, you turned your head to the side. gasping for air, while you could still smell and taste the sweat and apple, you did get mouthfuls of fresh air. You clearly were not trapped in the confines off the sneaker anymore, but was still plastered into the thick, orange sole of the giantess. As your vision starts to clear up, you notice, while still being stuck to the unaware giantess, that you were
154221123112112113.title: AJ's minuscule running partner

choices: You roll onto Applejack's bed, the mare none the wiser!
All your moving around wake's Applejack with a start!
Still unconscious, Applejack pushes her feet together - trapping you!
1542211231121121132.content:
Relief flooded through your body. At last, a break from being crushed by the inhabitants of this land. Judging by the snoring above you, the massive mare was catching up on a whole bunch of missed sleep. Maybe, you could finally find a way to escape.
Only then, you noticed that your body was almost completely stuck to her sole. Her sweat had dried around you, nearly fusing you with her flesh. To add to that, you realized that the flesh was partially engulfing you as well. As hard as you had been pummeled by her foot, it was no surprise that you had formed a small imprint in the squishy meat.

You groaned and desperately tried to get yourself unstuck... only to freeze as the whole foot twitched and the giantess let out an undignified snort. Was she this sensitive that she could even feel you while asleep? Dammit, that made everything even harder. If there was one thing you didn't want to happen, it was to just be buried again. You had to be very careful...

After you were certain that the gargantuan creature was still fast asleep, you slowly, oh so slowly, tried to pry yourself free. But there was nothing to be done while being careful. The dried sweat was far to sticky for you to get away. With dread, you realized that you would have to use force, risking the titaness to notice you.
But you couldn't just stay here. If you did, sooner or later you would go back into her shoes. Since you were sure that you would have nightmares of your time in them for years, you would do everything to avoid ever landing there again.

Gulping, you steadied yourself. It was now or never. At least the titan was asleep so even if she woke up, you would have a little bit of time to hide. Then, you sucked in as much air as you could...

And broke off the sweat! With one, swift motion, you freed yourself from your prison. As you tumbled forward, you couldn't help but laugh. Finally!
Now, you could only hope that the rest of your escape would go equally smoothly...
1542211231121121132.title: Sweet Apple Acres

choices: embedded into her sole
stuck to her slippers insole
1542211231122.content:
“Of course I remember Spike, I’m helping Fluttershy with her animals this morning” Twilight exclaimed, while also trying to shovel more off Spikes amazing pancakes into her mouth.
“Well Im glad you finally remembered Twilight, but pace yourself will you, don’t need you choking on my cooking, I have a reputation to up hold” Spike told Twilight, while passing over a cup of freshly squeezed orange juice.

While the giants spoke and laughed about their plans for the day ahead, you found yourself in the possibly worse scenario you could find yourself in. You are currently forced to breath in this giant girls natural foot odor, while currently being baked within her slipper. The furry slipper, added with the warmth from her fur covered foot is making the slipper feel like a sauna. You can feel yourself and the giants foot starting to build up a light cover of sweat, which is giving you something to drink, if you could muster the courage to do so though.

You were thankful however, since this girl has sat down and started eating, her foot is not now resting on your tiny frame, which gave you some space to breath in the growing musky air. However this soon changed though as her foot shifted from its position, and suddenly slammed back down, violently crushing your body and winding you. This definitely hurt, but thankfully you still didn't suffer any serious injury as this giantess started walking, each step from the foot you where under was painful for you and knocked the air from your lungs, and the only chance you had to breath was when she moved her weight off of you, causing you to gasp for breath each time she lifted her foot, the air was even thicker then before and you could taste Twilights sweat, which was incredibly salty.

As Twilight climbed back up the stairs to get ready, she started to get changed from her sleeping attire to the clothes she would wear today, which consisted of a dark purple blouse, and a simple pair or jeans. All that was left was to put on socks and sneakers. When she took off her slippers, she still did not notice that there was a tiny human currently?
1542211231122.title: Helping Fluttershy

choices: Twilight feels you - and wants to examine what has been stuck to her sole!
Twilight feels you - and shakes you off, landing you somewhere in the town!
Twilight doesn't feel you - and she starts jogging to Fluttershy's!
15422112311221.content:
You breathed a sigh of relief as your prison fell away, though. Even though the scent of her sweat was all permeating, it was good to get something at least resembling fresh air. However, your joy at this didn't last long as you realized something very important: The slipper had fallen away. But you were not in it. With horror, you realized that you had somehow become stuck to the gargantuan woman's foot. Desperately, you tried to fight your body free. You couldn't just stay here! It was a miracle that she hadn't stomped you to bits already. If you remained here, it was only a matter of time until you were nothing but paste.
But it was no use. No matter how much you struggled to break free, the collected sweat as well as the pressure had firmly wedged you into the giantess' sole. Your arms were stuck in a crease of flesh where the ball of her foot flowed into the sole itself. The thick liquid of her sweat glued your legs to her as well. There was no escape.

Blank horror filled you as you saw the gargantuan, white sock approaching! The fabric was thick. Cotton, probably. No matter what it was, getting stuck inside was not something you wanted to experience. You redoubled your efforts of escape, but soon became exhausted. After being stepped on for the last minutes, your muscles were screaming and you felt as if you hadn't rested at all!

There was nothing you could do, except stare on in terror as the giantess stuffed her toes into the sock and slowly pulled it upwards. The fabric rolled over you, sealing you in completely and mercilessly. It only took a moment for the giantess to engulf you completely. Your breathing became short as it trapped you once more with the musty scent of the massive creature's sweat. The hint of lavender didn't help much, anymore.

A familiar weight settled on top of you and everything got even tighter. You could barely see through the thick wool of the sock, but you believed to spy a large, yellow shape, a hole at the top. A sneaker. Of course. Your torment wouldn't be complete without being stuck in her shoe, as well.
The giantess quickly slipped the sneakers on and you were once more pressed into a sole. This one didn't have the soft interior of the last, instead you were pressed into hard and unforgiving canvas.

The weight suddenly intensified a hundred fold as the titaness rose, settling all of her body weight on to her feet. Your head was mercilessly pushed down into the sole. How was it possible that you were still alive? Had your body somehow gotten more durable in this world?
Whatever had happened, your nerves were certainly still the same. Your body was already sore from getting stuck in her slippers, but now the giantess had a spring in her step, as well. Every single footfall crushed the air out of you... and you could only guess how long you'd be stuck inside. From what you had heard, she was planning to help a friend. And she seemed intent on walking there...

You had to do something! If this went on, you could kiss your life goodbye. Though you had miraculously survived thus far, you doubted your luck would last much longer.
It didn't matter now, whether the giantess would be angry at your presence. You needed her to notice you if you wanted to stay alive. With the rest of your strength you wiggled and struggled. You could only hope her sole was sensitive enough that she would feel you...
15422112311221.title: Along for the ride

choices: Twilight runs all the  way to Fluttershy's
She gets distracted by Rainbow dash
154221123112213.content:
Will all the remaining energy you have left, you tried to wiggle as much as you possibly could, you tried to tickle her sole, you tried to kick your legs against her, you even tried to shout out, hoping, praying she would notice your tiny form. Step after step wiggles, every-time her sole would lift off you, you would gasp for any air, which thanks to being imprisoned not only in her sock but shoe now as well, only consisted of a overpower scent of musky lavender, which started to mix with the slowly buildup of sweat.

Twilight had gotten dressed, threw on some sneakers, and started to make her way towards Fluttershy's cottage, which was located just on the outta edge of town. As she wen about her business she greeted some of the ponies that was walking through town. "Good morning...." "hey how are you?" "Yes of course, just drop the book back to spike." She had not been in the small town of Ponyville long, maybe about 3-4 weeks at this point, and her and her friends had become some sort of heroes, having faced against the evil pony 'Nightmare Moon'. As she made her way towards the edge of the town square, She noticed the time on the clock tower, "10:18! Oh no I'm going to be late! I need get a move on!". It tasted just like it smelt, an over powering taste of salty lavender enters your system.

You lap at her foot every time she raises her foot, until suddenly you hear "Urg. I knew I shouldn't have worn these shoes." Hope filled your entire being, she was going to take off her shoe, and hopefully sock, and notice you. You would be free from this torment, then she can help you find a way home! Your dreams of being discovered instantly came crashing down on top of you, literally, as you felt the girl press down upon your tiny frame even harder than before, your muscles having spent all there energy trying to gain her attention, screamed in agony with every step. Wait, you seem to be raised in the air for a much shorter time now, and each step seems heavier... Your face pales at the realisation, she has just started to run. You can feel the heat start to increase with every pounding step, you try to lick her sole again, but needing to breath came first, and by the time you had sucked in all the air you could, it would be forced out of your lungs by this girl.

15422221.content:
You shook your head. Of course, falling asleep here was a bad idea! All it would take from the gargantuan woman was to roll to her side. There certainly were more unpleasant ends than being smashed to paste underneath a giantess' breasts, but you were still very much attached to your life. There also didn't seem to be much else that could make for either a hiding place or bed. The room was sparse, very sparse. Its only decoration were a large, wooden closet which, judging by the splinters might have been a hundred years old, and a thin carpet. Not exactly luxury places. Not to mention that getting down from here only opened the risk of getting stepped on, later.

No, there was only one thing to do. And that was to wake the sleeping titan up. A strange mixture of giddiness and fear filled you. It was time to meet the inhabitants of this strange new world! Not in a way you had planned, but still, it was a thing no one had ever experienced before you. Right now, you were making history.

Of course, for that you first had to actually wake the giantess, and you doubted she'd be much pleased if she found you between her massive breasts. You didn't want to look like a pervert on your first impression, anyway. So there wasn't much of a choice of where to go. Her face was the only place where you had a good chance of her actually feeling you. And though you had to scale her chin to get anywhere, it was preferable to anything else.

Slowly, you walked forward - and immediately stumbled. Your foot sunk into the soft flesh of the massive creature's breast, causing you to loose your balance. With a small scream, you rolled forward, holding your arms to your head in the hopes of protecting it from the impact. In the end, it was much less dramatic than you had thought. Your fall was more of a harmless bounce down her chest. The soft flesh gave in at the slightest pressure and it felt more like falling onto a sporting mattress than anything else.
Regaining your bearings, you stood up. At least the first part of your journey was already over - you had landed on her collarbone, right in front of her throat and chin. Thankfully, their was a very good way up to her face. A strand of her voluminous sandy blonde mane had fallen on her shoulder. The hairs were thick, and as sturdy as a steel wire to you.
You approached and grabbed one of the many hairs. It felt smooth, though tiny ridges were scattered all over it. Perfect. You could use these as climbing aids.

With your whole body, you hugged the strand of hair and slowly pulled yourself forward. While you climbed the enormous creature, her breath washed over you every so often. While you had to hold on tightly every time she exhaled, you couldn't help but notice that, like the rest of her, her breath held the faint smell of apples.
Finally, you got close enough that you could step on to her face. The ground was more stable here, though you still had difficulty holding your balance. The hard bones underneath provided solid ground, but the thin layer of skin and flesh above was not as safe. You had to make your way slowly.
Still, with determination, you approached her heavy eyelids. You could see the massive orbs underneath flick too and fro. The giantess was dreaming. Taking one last deep breath, you knelt down in front of her right eye lid. The thick, black hair of her eyelashes were almost as long as your forearm. This would be an ordeal.
You dug your tiny hands into the space between her upper and lower eyelids and pushed, forcing the skin open. Now, you could only hope that this would actually wake her.

You've got to get a move on or you;re going to end up either lost inside a wrinkle or smushed, and nether of those options sound very fun. All you need is something is something to help guide you... That's it!
Snapping your fingers, you remove your backpack and set it down, then unzip the the pouch and begin fishing around, pushing aside all the other doodads you brought until your hand closes around a small, hard object. Grinning giddily,you withdraw your phone and click the button on the side to reveal the home screen, then swipe down to activate the flashlight function. A narrow beam of light shoots out the other end, creating a decently visible circle of light on the bedspread.
This should provide you with enough illumination that you won't be tripping over yourself in the dark.
You zip up the pouch and resettle the pack over your shoulders, pulling the straps tight with a determined look on your face.
Now you're ready to face the unknown.

Giant Colorful Horse Anthros.

You started taking photos with your phone, evidence of your findings. You had a giant grin plastered in your face as you inspected the photos you had taken.

15432.title: Find some way to get down from here and inside

info.brief_description: You are a human who arrives in Equestria by mysterious means
info.description:
You are a human drawn into Equestria by unknown means and meet the cast of My Little Pony.
Also, a lot of mares really want to get into your pants for some reason.

It doesn't matter what you add so long as it's coherent and doesn't include toilet related stuff.
Write at least a paragraph, no one or two sentence chapters, please (unless it's a choice related chapter),
No death of the main characters, no digestion,no scat, and if you add chapters with age regression keep any description of diaper changing light.

...and remember, haaaaave fun with it!
